_comment: Compact policy and SLA catalog. Agents look these up to validate incidents.

security_policies.title: Egress allow-list for core PoP
security_policies.rule: Outbound traffic from CORE-* nodes must match the maintained egress allow-list. Unmatched destinations require security review.

security_policies.title: Read-only default for agents
security_policies.rule: AI agents are forbidden from executing any device config change, ACL update, or interface shutdown. All such actions require explicit human approval.

security_policies.title: Service account credential rotation
security_policies.rule: Compromised or suspected-compromised credentials must be rotated within 1 hour and the affected node placed under elevated monitoring for 24 hours.
